exercises.prompt: Do dimensions match? (1) v = d/t  (2) KE = ½mv  (3) W = Fd. Write the dimensions for each side.
Which of these is WRONG just by looking at dimensions? (1) d = vt  (2) a = vt  (3) v² = 2ad. Show why.
hints: Check if both sides have the same dimensions
If they don't match, it's wrong
